summary: Tested Labor Records feature for True Joy Birthing app. Backend: All 4 CRUD endpoints working (10/10 pytest tests pass). Frontend: LaborSection component renders correctly on midwife client detail page, shows existing records with summary data, and the Add Labor Entry modal opens with all required fields.
seed_data_creation: Existing labor record 'labor_2d442047a815' used for testing. Test records created during pytest were cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Labor Records feature is fully implemented and working. Backend APIs: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE on /api/midwife/clients/{client_id}/labor-records. Frontend: LaborSection component imported in ProviderClientDetail.tsx (line 27) and rendered for midwife role (line 782). The modal includes all fields: stage of labor, dilation, effacement, station, contraction pattern, membranes status, maternal vitals, fetal heart rate, and notes.

features_verified.backend_get_labor_records: ✓ VERIFIED - Returns labor records sorted by entry_datetime (newest first) with summary field
features_verified.backend_post_labor_record: ✓ VERIFIED - Creates new record with auto-generated labor_record_id, returns record with summary
features_verified.backend_put_labor_record: ✓ VERIFIED - Updates existing record, preserves entry_datetime if not provided
features_verified.backend_delete_labor_record: ✓ VERIFIED - Deletes record, returns 404 for subsequent GET
features_verified.frontend_labor_section_render: ✓ VERIFIED - LaborSection component renders on midwife client detail page
features_verified.frontend_existing_records_display: ✓ VERIFIED - Shows existing records with timestamp, stage badge, and vital chips (Dilation, Effacement, Station, FHR, BP)
features_verified.frontend_add_modal_opens: ✓ VERIFIED - Add Labor Entry modal opens with all fields
features_verified.frontend_add_modal_fields: ✓ VERIFIED - Modal contains: Stage of Labor, Labor Progress (Dilation/Effacement/Station), Contraction Pattern, Membranes, Maternal Wellbeing, Fetal Wellbeing, Notes

ui_elements_verified: Labor Records section header with pulse icon
Labor record card with timestamp and stage badge
Vital chips: Dilation 5cm, Effacement 80%, Station -1, FHR 145, BP 120/80
Add Labor Entry modal with all form sections
